description: Command line interface for @imqueue — scaffold Redis-RPC microservices, generate typed clients, and manage a local service fleet.
rules: Install globally with `npm i -g @imqueue/cli`; the binary is `imq`.
Scaffold a new service project with `imq service create`, and generate a typed client from a running service with `imq client generate <ServiceName>`.
Manage a local multi-service fleet with `imq ctl` and inspect config/logs with `imq config` and `imq log`.
@imqueue is GPL-3.0; a commercial license is available for closed-source use (see imqueue.com/license).
